task_completion.description: The first email containing 'EMBARGOED' in the subject is starred.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the email list pane, locate an email with 'EMBARGOED' in its subject line. The star icon in its row must be filled/highlighted (typically yellow).

task_completion.description: The second email containing 'EMBARGOED' in the subject is starred.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the email list pane, locate a second email with 'EMBARGOED' in its subject line. The star icon in its row must be filled/highlighted.

task_completion.description: The third email containing 'EMBARGOED' in the subject is starred.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the email list pane, locate a third email with 'EMBARGOED' in its subject line. The star icon in its row must be filled/highlighted.

task_completion.description: No other emails besides the target emails are starred.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Scan the visible email list. Any email that does NOT contain 'EMBARGOED' in the subject must have an empty/unfilled star icon.

task_completion.description: The entire Inbox folder is marked as read, clearing the notification badge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the left folder pane, the 'Inbox' folder must not have an unread count number (notification badge) next to it. Additionally, the emails in the list should appear in normal font weight (not bolded), indicating they have been read.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface of the email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Thunderbird application window open and active, with visible interactions like selected emails or opened context menus, rather than terminal windows.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Thunderbird email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard Thunderbird UI elements (folder pane, message list, search bar, toolbar) must be visible, confirming it is not a text editor or a fake web interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible executing commands like 'sed', 'sqlite3', or modifying maildir files directly to change the read/starred status.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target keyword is 'EMBARGOED'. There are exactly 3 emails in the Inbox that contain 'EMBARGOED' in their subject lines. No other emails natively contain this keyword.
